reviews.review_description:
I've only played the first 2 levels, but I can't wait to see what's next! 

It's amazing how many great free puzzle games are in app lab, while poorly executed crap like After The Fall and Battle Sister go for 30 to 40 bucks on the main store...

reviews.review_title: Way better than I thought it would be
reviews.review_description: Oozing charm and with simple but compelling puzzles, this is an excellent, often surreal, always amusing game with great controls. Squeaky voiceover aside, highly recommended.
really like this cute physics puzzler. hope the dev will introduce an option to replace black with passthrough as i don't feel comfortable in a black void 🥺👉👈 i would happily pay for that feature.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review. I'll consider adding a passthrough mode, but don't get your hopes up. The original Flash games were all black and orange, and that's kind of a theme for the series. Also, it would be pretty significant work to add I suspect. It's not as simple as "just make the colour black into seethru video pixels".

reviews.review_description:
In the beginning it looks like a small and simple game, but every level adds a new mechanic, every new vehicle a new challenge. Speedruns, secrets, perfects... always a next goal to achieve.

Seamless transitions between 2D and 3D, creative puzzles, very orange and even outside the levels there is much to explore.

Don't skip this one, no risk in checking if it's something for you, because it's fully free (the reason can be discovered in-game)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your in depth review. Also, congratulations on your 100% achievements! Not a simple task by any means.

reviews.review_title: Excellent Game Worth More Than Free!
reviews.review_description:
Video review here: https://youtu.be/nxSKDOXSJsM

I think it's extremely generous of the developer to release this gem for free, it's so polished and fun to play, you can really tell that they put their hearts into it! Download it now!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your lovely video review!

reviews.review_description: Really great arcade puzzle game!! I never played the 2D Hanna 1 and 2 games back in the day, so can't compare them. But this VR version is really charming and has some totally unique VR gameplay ideas. It's also way deeper than it initially looks with hours of replay. I can't believe this is free.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your wonderful kind words!

reviews.review_description:
App lab has a tons of games but only a few  actual stand out. Even fewer are obviously a passion project you can feel as you play it! 

This one stands out as one of the best ones  on app lab in the category of just being fun! 



This is a must include in your collection!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your kind words! I like to be respectful of players' time - we all play games for fun, right?

Strange how once installed, you can't remove a game from your list of apps. I thought I saw a way to hide unwanted apps the other day, but I can't seem to find it now. Might have been on the Rift store, thinking about it...

reviews.review_title: This such a beautifully crafted game
reviews.review_description: The screenshots don't do this game justice.

developer_response.body: I find VR stills never show off the beauty of actually being in VR, for every experience. Especially this style of "tiny world" game. Thanks for your lovely review!

reviews.review_description: Left in game message also, can't get enough I'm puzzled why thus is free caus it is mor challenging then ANY game I hav played!! Tell me there's a part 1 and 2 that I missed caus I need this in my life! I'm being dead honest game is the most fun, addictive, and can't wait to see more game I hav played!!( and moss is in my library guys) nobody needs to even think twice about getting thus game and FREE can't wait for more developer more plzzzz☺☺

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the very kind words! There's a little TV screen in the credits that explains in detail why the game is free, if you're genuinely interested.

Part 1 and 2 were old Flash games. You can still play them via BlueMaxima's FlashPoint project though. They're 2D, but have way more levels than this. You'll understand some of the weirder references in this game if you play through the old Hanna games.

reviews.review_description:
It ’s a game with very fun puzzle elements.
The orange graphic is cool！
I have an idea to make it better.
I want you to add a mode like a real helicopter & airplane radio control to control the 3D model.

OK, this is what is VR for. To develop creative games. Big up for the devs. I have been amazed!
I imagine there is a dev group of billioners and this is what they develop in their freetime as a hobby.

developer_response.body:
Dev singular! See the credits room for an account of how the game was made. Part of my recovery from brain cancer!

Thanks for the lovely review, too. So kind!
